mapper.sql: application_id, application_no, applicant_account_id, applicant_name, applicant_phone, claimed_identity, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, community_name, community_address, declared_household_count, community_fingerprint, status, review_mode, reviewer_account_id, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_dept_id, review_comment, fallback_reason, provisioned_tenant_id, version, submitted_at, reviewed_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_community_registration_application ( application_no, applicant_account_id, applicant_name, applicant_phone, claimed_identity, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, community_name, community_address, declared_household_count, community_fingerprint, status, version, submitted_at, reviewed_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{applicationNo}, #{applicantAccountId}, #{applicantName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{applicantPhone}, #{claimedIdentity}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{communityName}, #{communityAddress}, #{declaredHouseholdCount}, #{communityFingerprint}, #{status}, #{version}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_community_registration_application SET applicant_name = #{row.applicantName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, claimed_identity = #{row.claimedIdentity}, province_code = #{row.provinceCode}, province_name = #{row.provinceName}, city_code = #{row.cityCode}, city_name = #{row.cityName}, district_code = #{row.districtCode}, district_name = #{row.districtName}, community_name = #{row.communityName}, community_address = #{row.communityAddress}, declared_household_count = #{row.declaredHouseholdCount}, community_fingerprint = #{row.communityFingerprint}, status = #{row.status}, review_mode = #{row.reviewMode}, reviewer_account_id = #{row.reviewerAccountId}, reviewer_user_id = #{row.reviewerUserId}, reviewer_dept_id = #{row.reviewerDeptId}, review_comment = #{row.reviewComment}, fallback_reason = #{row.fallbackReason}, provisioned_tenant_id = #{row.provisionedTenantId}, submitted_at = #{row.submittedAt}, reviewed_at = #{row.reviewedAt}, version = version + 1, update_time = #{row.updateTime} WHERE application_id = #{row.applicationId} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_community_registration_housing_tag (application_id, housing_tag) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{housingTag}) ON CONFLICT (application_id, housing_tag) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT housing_tag FROM t_community_registration_housing_tag WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY housing_tag

SELECT material_id, application_id, material_type, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, uploaded_by_account_id, status, create_time FROM t_community_registration_material WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY create_time ASC, material_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_community_registration_material WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT review_id, application_id, decision, review_mode, reviewer_account_id, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_dept_id, review_comment, fallback_reason, create_time FROM t_community_registration_review WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, review_id ASC

SELECT onboarding_id, application_id, tenant_id, status, official_affiliation_status, space_ledger_status, property_roster_status, denominator_status, owner_access_qr_status, initialization_dept_id, committee_dept_id, applicant_work_user_id, created_by_user_id, create_time, update_time FROM t_community_onboarding_workspace WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_community_registration_audit ( application_id, actor_account_id, actor_user_id, actor_dept_id, event_type, from_status, to_status, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{actorAccountId}, #{actorUserId}, #{actorDeptId}, #{eventType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSONB) )
mapper.select: SELECT dept_id, ancestors, dept_name, dept_type, dept_category, tenant_id FROM sys_dept WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status = '0'
SELECT policy_id FROM t_governance_policy WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY effective_at DESC, policy_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_tenant_community ( tenant_id, tenant_code, tenant_short_code, tenant_name, property_area_name, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, street_name, address, planned_household_count, owners_assembly_established, committee_established, rule_config_id, governance_status, status, registration_fingerprint ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{tenantCode}, #{tenantShortCode}, #{tenantName}, #{propertyAreaName}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{streetName}, #{address}, #{plannedHouseholdCount}, #{ownersAssemblyEstablished}, #{committeeEstablished}, #{ruleConfigId}, #{governanceStatus}, 'ACTIVE', #{registrationFingerprint} )
mapper.select: SELECT role_id, role_key, fixed_data_scope, default_data_scope FROM sys_role WHERE role_key = #{roleKey} AND status = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (account_id, dept_id, user_name, nick_name, status) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{deptId}, #{userName}, #{nickName}, '0')
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, effective_data_scope, granted_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{effectiveDataScope}, #{grantedBy})
INSERT INTO t_committee_member_position (tenant_id, user_id, position, status) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{position}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT user.user_id FROM sys_user user JOIN sys_dept dept ON dept.dept_id = user.dept_id JOIN sys_user_role user_role ON user_role.user_id = user.user_id JOIN sys_role role ON role.role_id = user_role.role_id WHERE user.account_id = #{accountId} AND user.status = '0' AND dept.status = '0' AND dept.dept_category = 'G' AND ( dept.dept_id = #{reviewerDeptId} OR #{reviewerDeptId}::TEXT = ANY(STRING_TO_ARRAY(dept.ancestors, ',')) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN dept.dept_id = #{reviewerDeptId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, user.user_id LIMIT 1
